title: Glorious Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A classic Southeast Asian dish featuring marinated chicken, grilled to perfection and served with a side of spicy peanut sauce.

ingredients.name: peanuts
ingredients.notes: peanut butter can be used as substitute

instructions: 2. In a blender or food processor, combine coconut milk, palm sugar, coriander powder, cumin powder, kaffir lime leaves, lemongrass, and grated ginger. Blend until smooth.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the blended mixture, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Add the chicken and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
4. Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers.
5. Grill the chicken for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Meanwhile, toast the peanuts in a dry pan over medium heat, until fragrant.
7. In a blender or food processor, combine the toasted peanuts, peanut butter, soy sauce, lime juice, and chili flakes. Blend until smooth.
8. Serve the grilled chicken with the peanut sauce and garnish with fresh cilantro.
